name: unguard
description: Prove data-shape guarantees with ast-grep rule packs
author: TwoAbove

scripts.test:rules:tsx: npm run generate:tsx && ast-grep test -c rulepacks/tsx/sgconfig.yml
scripts.test:rules: npm run test:rules:typescript && npm run test:rules:tsx
scripts.test:rules:tsx:update: npm run generate:tsx && ast-grep test -c rulepacks/tsx/sgconfig.yml -U
scripts.test:rules:update: npm run test:rules:typescript:update && npm run test:rules:tsx:update
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run generate:tsx && npm run test:rules
